title: corybas sumatranus
intro: Corybas sumatranus, also known as the Summer Orchid or Corybas, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Sumatra, Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Corybas sumatranus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, its roots are used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
